# Julius Elinson

> Staff Software Engineer with 11 years at Google across Ads, Geo, and Payments. Builder of consumer products and internal tools at scale.

## About

- [Home](https://jelinson.com/): Julius Elinson — Staff Software Engineer, Ex-Google

## Projects

Other projects include Room 77 (travel search startup, acquired by Google), InspectionX (AI-powered home inspection software, Technical Advisor), Big G's Finder (ice cream flavor tracker), Flowcart (grocery route optimizer), and C-Plane (Disney Animation Studios collaboration framework, basis for US Patent 8,645,845).

- [Google](https://jelinson.com/projects/google.html): 11 years at Google — selected press coverage of shipped products including YouTube Likeness Detection, Google Maps Stop Signs & Traffic Lights, Hotel Natural Language Filters, and TrustYou Hotel Review Score integration
- [Interview Club](https://jelinson.com/projects/interviewclub.html): Two-sided marketplace connecting engineers with companies needing technical interview services. LAUNCH Hackathon 2015 finalist, $10,000+ in prizes. Built in 48 hours.
